chunks.memory_unit_text: In the ccxt/ccxt release v4.5.27, the project adds fetchTime for coinmate, new APIs for cryptocom, coinex, coinsph, and gate, a default nonceWindow parameter for whitebit authenticated calls, and a new Zebpay exchange integration. It also includes error mapping improvements for binance and bitget, unification of order types for binance, market type inference for coincatch fetchTickers, a fix for hyperliquid hip3 dex loading, removal of check_conflicting_proxies camelCase in Exchange.py, and various other fixes and dependency bumps.

chunks.memory_unit_text: In the ccxt/ccxt release v4.5.29, the project introduces a rolling window rate limiter feature in Exchange, adds unWatch methods for bitmart and private unWatch methods for hyperliquid, adds createSubAccount for hyperliquid, and adds contract methods for zaif and margin methods for zebpay. It also includes numerous refactors of hasStopLoss/hasTakeProfit across multiple exchanges, transpiler chore updates, documentation link replacements, encoding fixes, and various other fixes and rate limit adjustments.
